community.name: Wonderland
community.description:
Wond@rland is an Roleplay that takes place after one has died and goes through all the trials and tribulations of a wandering soul, trapped in Purgatory.
Please, join us!


https://vrc.group/WNDRP.9397

community.name: Local Police Department
community.description:
Welcome the LPD, one of VRChats oldest and largest roleplaying groups bringing entertainment to public lobbies since 2018. The LPD hosts daily VRChat events where officers are assigned to a squad to create roleplay scenarios in public lobbies, themed around interactions with the public and emergency services. Due to the nature of improv, anything can happen during these events. From drug busts and shootouts, to checking mirror dwelling licenses. 

To join the LPD check out the recruitment channel on our Discord at <color=#7289daff>discord.gg/lpd</color>. There you will find the application form as well as our handbook which is packed with all kinds of important information. Once accepted you will go through cadet training, before jumping into patrolling VRChat as an official LPD officer. When you have some experience under your belt you can take additional training to move up the ranks or specialize into other kinds of roleplay that we offer.

Patrol officers will arrest people and bring them to the LPD station to take their mugshot that then gets posted on our discord server for everyone to see. If they choose to not come quietly we have our swat team, known as SLRT, to help persuade them. Once the suspect has been processed they will be handed over to our Corrections Officers and given a nice new home in the LPD Prison with all the other prisoners. And if anyone gets hurt in the process they can be treated by the LMT at our Hospital. To find out how you can help keep the streets of VRChat safe, join our Discord or follow us on Twitter @LPD_vr.

community.name: 1st Weimar Republic
community.description:
Welcome to the 1st Weimar Republic!

We’re an alternate history VRChat roleplay group based around 1920's Interwar Germany.

We host weekly immersive RP events in the Weimar Republic;
Daily Life of Soldiers
Combat RP
Military Training
Ceremonies

From fighting in the street and countryside against uprisings to simply living out the daily life of a soldier, our events tell an ongoing narrative influenced by all of our members. Want to know more? If Immersive RP, Alt-History or History, and an interesting story appeal to you, then the 1st Weimar Republic is the place for you!

https://discord.gg/ZMP49H3zSY

Join now, become part of our growing community, and leave your mark upon the Republic!

community.name: Silvadorkable
community.description:
The Monster Waifu aims to assist others with alleviating their stress‚ anxiety‚ and worries using ASMR‚ Guided Meditation‚ and other relaxation techniques․

Youtube videos aimed at relaxation․

community.name: Gopal and the Shadow Band
community.description: A community celebrating Gopal and The Shadow Band - VRChat's premiere Dark Pop‚ Gothic Rock and Industrial act - and your gateway to Metro Crypt․

community.name: Vagabonds Haven
community.description: A bar that is run by a band of mercs․ There is more than bartending‚ though that's up to you to discover were also a pc based roleplay group

community.name: Noved Squad
community.description:
Welcome to the Noved Squadǃ 

Home of the Noved Notes Podcastǃ
A VRChat Podcast that goes into the amazing creators of VRChatǃ

In the Noved Squad Community‚ we do a bunch of hangouts‚ game nights‚ DJ Noved Party Nights‚ and collaborate to make amazing creations on VRChatǃ Overall we just like to have funǃ

We also hold the annual Squad Forever Fest Charity Event in support of the International Association for Suicide Prevention! Learn more at my booth!

community.name: Galaxy Fleet Command
community.description: Galaxy Fleet Command is a group of Star Trek enthusiasts in locations scattered around planet earth, who have taken up virtual residence in SecondLife and VRChat. It is here, in this virtual world where we come to live, work and play out our roles as Star Fleet Officers, Shuttle Pilots, Academy Instructors, Engineers, Medical personnel, and various other functions.

community.name: Tuatha Dé Danann
community.description:
Welcome to Tuatha Dé Danann, a community which revolves around a hidden society of mages and their many associates‚ all of which have evaded the ever-watching eyes of a world ruled by corrupt Megacorps․

We'll be offering a variety of fun and unique activities for our members‚ such as story-based events‚ hangouts‚ game nights‚ and many moreǃ It should also be mentioned that the Tuatha Dé Danann isn't just for members of our community‚ but also for friends and and people looking to have funǃ If you're still reading this‚ then we've probably caught your interest․ Perhaps continue and see what else is in store?

community.name: Forjadores Hispanic community of VRChat
community.description: We are a community of Hispanic creators that gets together to help and share knowledge about worlds, avatars and general content for VRChat. We have regular events on Sundays and our big event called "Forjaversario" where we celebrate the anniversary of our community.

community.name: Kochō no Yakuza
community.description:
We are a roleplay VRChat community themed after the Yakuza game series and Japanese culture in general. We wish to provide, bring together and entertain. 

Providing a friendlier place for VRChat public to roleplay in is one of the aims we wish to achieve, alongside with helping other communities with bigger projects.

Bringing together both new and veteran players who have nowhere else to go, educate people about VRChat as a whole and keeping them up to date on what is going on in this vast but confusing place.

Entertaining both the public and our own people with external and internal roleplay which are still in development. Giving people a place to feel welcomed and a place anybody can feel they belong to.

community.name: El Alba
community.description:
（EN） El Alba is a multicultural VRChat community focused on creating a welcoming, respectful, and non-toxic space for adults 18+. We organize social gatherings, world hopping, themed events, maid café experiences, movie nights, creative projects, community discussions, and collaborations with other VRChat groups. Our goal is to offer a SFW, accessible, and supportive environment where people can connect, grow, and enjoy VRChat at their own pace.

（ES） El Alba es una comunidad multicultural de VRChat enfocada en crear un espacio acogedor, respetuoso y no tóxico para adultos 18+. Organizamos reuniones sociales, world hopping, eventos temáticos, maid café, noches de películas, proyectos creativos, charlas comunitarias y colaboraciones con otros grupos de VRChat. Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer un ambiente SFW, accesible y de apoyo, donde las personas puedan conectar, crecer y disfrutar VRChat a su propio ritmo.

（JP） エル・アルバは、18歳以上の大人向けに、歓迎的で、思いやりがあり、非トキシックな空間を作ることを目指している、多文化のVRChatコミュニティです。交流イベント、ワールドホッピング、テーマイベント、メイドカフェ、映画鑑賞会、創作プロジェクト、コミュニティでの会話、そして他のVRChatグループとのコラボレーションを行っています。私たちは、誰もが自分のペースでつながり、成長し、VRChatを楽しめるような、SFWで参加しやすく、支え合える環境を大切にしています。

community.name: The Helldivers of VRC
community.description: We are a live action roleplay community based on the popular I.P Helldivers 2. We try to recreate the chaos and battles seen in Helldivers 2 and put them into VRChat with our own special twists that normally isn't seen within the helldivers lore.

community.name: Chimkins
community.description:
ChimkinsVRC is a small VRChat Worlds game development team. Our primary goal is to make PC quality experiences accessible to all platforms on VRChat with enough depth to rival that of full size Virtual Reality titles. We have many projects in the works and are excited to share them with everyone, so come by and visit us at our booth!

We currently have 4 worlds released publicly:
- Zombie Survival
- Deagle Duel
- The Hunt: Remastered
- The Hunt

community.name: Yukio's World Works
community.description: It is my world work because i make maps for VRChat and on jinxxy

community.name: The Rocky Horror Picture Show
community.description:
Greeting Creature of the night,
    Here we provide the same experience just like the Midnight showing of RHPS IRL with a VR twist. We do a Shadow cast show with the movie with callouts and emoji throwing just like IRL. We invite the newbies to join are world and welcome back the love ones we haven't seen in a long time. If you never seen the movie, unable to get to a live stage show, or just want to fell the love again with the family, then come join us and let's Do The Time Wrap Again!

P.S., we live by a simple motto: Don't dream it, Be it.

community.name: Raujinn's Avatar Workshop
community.description: I make from-scratch original avatars and avatar assets, both for public and for sale.

community.name: Kursenic Bureau of Anomali
community.description:
Hey we are a group called Kursenic Bureau Of Anomali
We host majority things to do with the unexplainable（SCP-like）

community.name: The Virtual Gauntlet
community.description: The Virtual Gauntlet is a VR game show hosted in VRChat where two teams of four compete in fast-paced, skill-based obstacle course challenges. The show runs in seasons with a strong cyberpunk theme and features unique games like Dodge Wall, Rift Rush, and Grid Lock. We record and stream the matches, promote the teams involved, and offer in-world prizes like trophies and group shoutouts. It's built to spotlight player communities, bring hype energy to VR gaming, and create something exciting for both players and viewers.

community.name: The Cathedral
community.description: We are a Goth ＆ Industrial Club who strive for interpersonal connection‚ a unified love of Goth music and culture‚ provide a welcoming space for those who find beauty in the darkness‚ and encourage fellowship in our community․ We have main events every other Sunday, with secondary events that vary.

community.name: SCP Foundation of VRChat
community.description:
"The SCP Foundation of VRChat is a roleplay community based on the SCP Wiki‚ but in order to provide a spoiler-free experience‚ almost all content and lore is made by the community or heavily modified․

Players who join the Foundation are given the option to hang out as a Visitor or choose between Serious RP‚ Casual RP‚ or both․

From there‚ they can choose to join the Mobile Task Force‚ the Research Office or the Internal Security Department․"

community.name: Toren
community.description: The community is where a group of people enjoy the games beyond and have developed.

community.name: Omega
community.description: An 18+ VRChat community dedicated to themed adventures, virtual fashion, creativity, and making genuine connections. Dress for the occasion, explore immersive experiences, meet new people, and celebrate individuality through unique events designed to keep VRChat fresh, inspiring, and fun. From Fashion Voyages & Runway Parties to Winter Balls and Creator Collaborations, Omega by AstrixZ is a place where self-expression and new experiences shine.

community.name: Paranormal Scene Investigators
community.description:
Paranormal Scene Investigators is a roleplay group focused on the paranormal and unknown. We have weekly events where we delve into the eldritch, the paranormal and the unknown of the VR world

From vampires and cryptids
To Ghosts and Spirits.
To Technological nightmares and cults....
To much much more.

We are our own original universe based on paranormal legends and folktales throughout the world

Some of our events will use D20 to act out some of our roleplay. We are light hearted but most importantly fun!
We are PC and Quest compatible. We lean a bit more towards PC with special effects but try our best to accommodate Quest users.
Come check us out!

community.name: House of Resurrection
community.description:
"Salvation awaits you on Europa"

Set within the Destiny universe, The House of Resurrection is a Fallen House that are recovering from a Disastrous Event Known as the Whirlwind which lead to them fleeing to the Sol System..  Rally Under their banner, as they try to seek out others of their kind that are lost throughout the Universe of the Destiny franchise as well as unearthing the Dangers that come with it.

This server uses the games lore as well it’s own story to create VRC PVP/ PVE combat based events as well  as Having certain events that are built around certain key server  lore events which contain things such as Battles and exploration of different planets and destinations.
s a combat based server filled with events both filled with Lore and VRChat PVP aspects․"

community.name: Altered Evil
community.description:
Virtual band of Low Poly Vampires who meme in VRChat
Check the Youtube channel for all our vidsǃ

community.name: First Class Coffin
community.description:
Unleash your inner monster with thrilling and chilling low-poly VR rock and roll‚ where the undead groove and the living lose themselves to the musicǃ

First Class Coffin bring the finest Halloween Horror Pop‚ fully embalmed with '80s and '90s vibes

community.name: Creative Impressions
community.description:
Creative Impressions is an artistic community aims to bring all of the incredibly talented artists within the VR community together! We aim to create a fun and safe space for artists of all kinds to gather and share their work within our channels and exhibition events, and we hope to inspire anyone and everyone that comes across us.

We offer an array of different artistic channels in our discord server for people to chat and share their works, but we also host a handful of different common events such as R&R and Art studio!
 We plan to host 1 big gallery event a year that will feature many different types of artwork of all different types of media!

community.name: AWMC Industries
community.description:
Step into the boundless universe of the Allied Waifu Military Core Industries also known as AI‚ your premier universewide military arms dealerǃ
Set in the spacefaring era of the year 2200＋‚ AWMC Industries stands as a beacon of innovation in the vast expanse of space․

When Earth fell victim to an unknown extraterrestrial force during the chaos of the Third World War‚ advanced weaponry‚ including machine soldiers powered by artificial intelligence‚ clashed in a desperate bid for survival․ Amidst the devastation‚ these androids emerged‚ alerting humanity to the imminent threat approaching earth․
Despite the warnings‚ blinded by greed‚ many humans ignored the approaching catastrophe․ Until it was too late․
A select few androids and humans escaped Earth's demise‚ vowing to safeguard humanity's legacy and principles․ Thus‚ they founded a military dedicated to preserving these ideals‚ recognizing that a formidable arsenal is the way of survival․
Emerging as a prominent arms manufacturer and formidable military force‚ AI stands as a beacon of strength and integrity‚ its vast fleet traversing the galaxies to uphold its values․

Whether you're a seasoned spacefarer or a green recruit‚ AI welcomes all to forge the destiny of galaxies․ Enlist today and be the bastion of humanitys legacy․

Caution˸ Enlisting requires disposal of your biological embodiment․

community.name: Cult of Secrets
community.description:
The Cult of Secrets is a group in the world of medieval fantasy role-playing. However, beyond that, it represents a safe haven for those seeking a warm and friendly environment. Here they can be their authentic selves without fear of judgment or criticism.

Our goal is a community committed to the emotional well-being of its members, ready to offer support and solutions to everyday problems. But above all, the Cult of Secrets is a light in the darkness for those lost, offering them hope and a space for renewal.

Join this group and discover the true power of friendship, solidarity, and empathy in a world increasingly in need of these qualities.

community.name: The Faceless
community.description:
The Faceless Inc. is a disabled-veteran-founded 501(c)(3) nonprofit using accessible virtual spaces to remove barriers to arts, humanities, STEAM learning, cultural knowledge, skill-sharing, and community belonging. We serve people excluded by cost, disability, geography, identity-based discrimination, social isolation, or lack of safe inclusive spaces. 
Through programs like Portal Posse and the Echoes Project, we host and preserve public conversations with cultural figures, originators, innovators, educators, artists, astronauts, historians, dancers, creators, and community knowledge-keepers, making meaningful knowledge and under-documented cultural memory accessible beyond the moment of the event.

community.name: EksCelle
community.description: I am a world creator known for making dark and gothic worlds. I mostly make worlds for DJ events. I have many upcoming projects in the pipeline. Thank you for taking the time to check out my work.

community.name: TheIdioticBard
community.description: I'm Bard‚ a silly lil digital artist that forgets they need to actually post it anywhere! Though you can find my art on Tumblr and Artfight whenever I do remember to post! You can also contact me via discord for commissions! ( ^w^)
